entry.title: lissy93 contributed to lissy93/dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 merged lissy93/dashy#2258 · July 21, 2026 11:59
Fixes for Mario #2258

Category

Bugfix

Overview

  • When appConfig.disableContextMenu is set, this should only disable the right-click context menu, not left-click
    • Fixes #2255
+329 -177
4 comments
